runners.formComment: Quickly away at Manukau two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at Manukau last start over 318m from this same draw. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (21.68) over 375m at this track. Has a low draw. Looks to have turned things around so follow her up.

runners.formComment: Scored by 6 lengths last time (21.26) in a Class 1 over 375m at this track. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Expected to measure up again.

runners.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (21.85) over 375m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Top-three hope with the right run.

runners.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Scout Jack at Manukau last start over 318m (18.95). Must keep safe.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at this track over 375m (21.52) beating Sober Driver in Class 1 on April 9. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Class 2 on April 7 over 313m at Wanganui Straight behind Big Time Ashton beaten 4.5 lengths (17.48). Solid formlines coming through that last run. Well placed and should feature.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 375m in 21.51. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 375m at this track at Class 1/2 level. Looks up against it this time.

runners.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a seventh over 318m at Manukau. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed entering first turn, tightened and checked rounding bend, lost ground.
